_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Node.js - WolfBot
author: admin@xwolf.space
description: Node.js egg for running WhatsApp bots. Auto-installs WolfBot on server creation.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y git curl

cd /mnt/server

# Clone the bot repo if not already present
if [ -z "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
  git clone https://github.com/7silent-wolf/silentwolf.git .
else
  echo "Files already present, skipping clone."
fi

# Install dependencies
if [ -f package.json ]; then
  npm install --omit=dev
  echo "Dependencies installed."
fi

echo "WolfBot installation complete. Start the server to run."

variables.name: Bot JS File
variables.description: The main JS file to run

variables.name: Max RAM MB
variables.description: Max old space size for Node.js in MB
